title: Rewind
description: Rewind adds a new unique item called the rewind clock. Using the rewind clock will teleport you to previous location from 5 seconds ago
body: This mod adds the rewind clock that lets you bend time to your will. When used, the Time Rewind Clock instantly teleports you back to where you were 5 seconds ago, allowing you to escape dangerous situations, correct mistakes, or simply experiment with the flow of time.
